narrative:
Galion 3B (precinct in Crawford County) has 859 registered voters, with 66.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.9%, a modest Republican lean of 5.4 percentage points.
